title: exarrhena albiflora
intro: Exarrhena albiflora, a type of orchid native to Australia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Exarrhena albiflora is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, colds, and respiratory issues. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to make teas and infusions, which are believed to possess health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function. Exarrhena albiflora is often prepared as a tincture or dried herb for use in herbal remedies and supplements.
